column1: # Generated from decompiled.c analysis of 116 LOW-confidence "app" module entries

column6: evidence
iterates 0x38 ready lists + delayed + suspended + terminated via vTaskSuspendAll/xTaskResumeAll, fills 0x24-byte TaskStatus_t array
fills TaskStatus_t struct (0x24 bytes) from TCB: base priority, stack watermark, handle, state
iterates FreeRTOS list, calls vTaskGetInfo_internal for each item, returns count
counts consecutive 0xA5 (tskSTACK_FILL_BYTE) canary bytes, returns count>>2 = stack high watermark
returns *(pxCurrentTCB + 0x54) which is the task name pointer in TCB
returns pxCurrentTCB + 0x34 which is the name field offset in TCB
allocs 8-byte WSF msg, sets event=0x24, conn/params, posts via WsfMsgSend to handler
iterates 10 records (stride 200), checks +0x2f and +0x30 flags, returns 1 if match found
iterates 10 records (stride 200) or single record, writes param_2 to +0x84 (security level)
returns DAT_00474784 = pointer to SMP database global struct
copies 0x10 bytes (key data) to SMP DB struct if param_1 != 0
sets byte at record+0xC2 = param_2, single-field setter on SMP DB record
checks buffer offset < 0x1195, calls FUN_004cd110 to compute remaining; returns 0 if full
validates stream buffer state: checks magic, mode=1, size in [1..0x1194], compares computed hash
clears buffer (memset 0x11ac bytes to 0), resets write pointer to 0
appends formatted data to stream buffer via snprintf-like call, clamps to 0x1194 max
iterates conn entries by handle, adjusts +0x18/+0x19 credit counters, calls flow control callback
returns bool from DAT+0x91 flag (slave connection readiness check)
if sync frame active, copies param_1+0x10 into destination via task handler
calls slave_cmd_extract, invokes callback at +0x7c, then APP_evenhub_page_handler
calls FUN_0049db7c (disconnect check), then slave_cmd_reset, invokes callback
extracts pipe byte from *param_1 into param_2+4
resets slave command state: clears pipe, descriptor, display lock, iterates 2 eyes
routes audio command based on mode flag (0=coordinate copy, 1=direct dispatch)
checks connection flags, calls system_alert handler and SMP DB cleanup on disconnect
implements zigzag encoding: negative -> ~(val<<1), positive -> val<<1, then calls pb_encode varint
calls nanopb_process(param_1, param_2, 4) - writes 4-byte fixed-width field
calls nanopb_process(param_1, param_2, 8) - writes 8-byte fixed-width field
table-driven CRC32 with inverted init (~*param_3) and final (~result), byte-by-byte via DAT_004cd17c lookup table
calls frexp(), stores exponent in *param_1, returns mantissa
finds empty slot (handle==-1) in 3-slot table (stride 0x1c), assigns handle and zeros state
finds slot by handle, frees WSF buffers, resets handle to 0xFFFF, adjusts credit counter
searches 3-slot table for matching handle, returns slot pointer or 0
searches 3-slot table for entry with valid handle AND active flag set
thin wrapper calling l2cCocRegisterCid
thin wrapper calling l2cCocDeregisterCid
manages L2CAP credit flow: splits data if needed, writes handle bytes, calls l2cCocSendPacket
finds empty slot (-1) in 6-element PSM table, stores protocol/service multiplexer handle
finds matching PSM handle in 6-element table, sets slot to -1
parses variable-length ANCC attribute list (max 5 attrs, max 4 bytes each) from byte stream
filters GATT notification for handle 0x2026, pipe 0x12; allocs WSF msg with opcode 0x26
sets bit in DAT_004d649c bitmap based on short param (audio channel pending flag)
writes 8 bits via GPIO clock/data lines (MSB first), shifts param_1 left each iteration
reads 8 bits via GPIO data line with clock toggling, returns assembled byte
reads single byte from DAT_004dac58 (SPI device status register)
configures GPIO pins 0x3d/0x3e/0x3f for SPI bit-bang (CS/CLK/MOSI), sets initial direction
configures register 0x75 with deep sleep bit (0x2000) based on enable param
SPI flash transaction: validates params, waits for BUSY clear, performs read/write via mspi_spi_flash_read
reads image table pointer and count from flash based on device status (primary/secondary)
iterates image table entries, reads each from flash, verifies CRC32 against stored checksum
blinks GPIO pin 0x0F with ~33ms period for (param_1 * 1000 / 33) cycles
reads device ID via SPI flash, compares against expected value in loop
sends JEDEC ID command (0x01, 0x06, 0xFD, 0x00) via mspi_spi_flash_transact, checks NACK
sends register read command (0x01, 0x01, 0xFD, 0x05) with address, copies response
sends register write command (0x01, 0x03, 0xFD) with address and data payload
writes firmware data in 0xF8-byte chunks via mspi_flash_write_register, calls progress callback
reads firmware from flash, computes CRC32, verifies against expected value for each image
reads then modifies two flash config registers (clears bits, writes new value), logs results
reads 8-byte Bluetooth device address from flash via SPI transaction with 9-byte command
sends 6-byte reset command to flash device via SPI transaction
writes 0x8C-byte patch with CRC32 header (0x805C4000, type=2) and 8-byte payload via SPI
reads 8-byte version info from flash via SPI transaction with 9-byte command (same as bdaddr pattern)
resolves BLE address for pairing: checks bond records, allocates SMP DB record, initiates security via DmSecPairReq
returns byte at DAT+0x96 (quicklist/health page state flag), adjacent to APP_quicklist_page_close
waits for IOM power control completion, then configures GPIO pin mux and mode registers
builds 10-word GPU command list entry with src/dst dimensions, blend flags, clip rect via lv_nema_helper
initializes DMA display transfer: clears control registers, configures source/format/stride, calls MSPI DMA sync
dispatches glyph load through driver vtable (+0x3c), retries on error 0x13 (FT_Err_Unimplemented_Feature)
wrapper: validates face/module, then calls FT_Load_Glyph_dispatch via driver chain
searches 8-entry table (stride 0x18, offset 0x2ac) for matching handle value
scans flash sectors for 4-byte magic marker (DAT_0051bf2c), returns offset or -1
validates handle magic (0x1ffffff mask), clears handle and status fields
validates handle, checks config version==2, packs 7 config fields into single 32-bit control register
validates handle, slot<8, sample rate in [0x20..0x3f], packs 6 fields into per-slot register
validates handle, configures window comparator: threshold bits and range value (10-bit)
validates handle, enables window comparator flag and sets interrupt enable bit
validates handle, clears window comparator MSB flag (0x7FFFFFFF mask)
validates handle, sets enable bit 0x2000000 in handle and control register
validates handle, clears enable bits, resets config mode, calls power control
applies floating-point gain correction to ADC sample using calibration coefficients
validates handle, writes 0x37 to reference generator config register for powerup
maps frame duration (2500/5000/7500/10000us) to index 0-4, returns encode quality tier
maps sample rate (8000-48000Hz) to index 0-6 for LC3 codec, with stereo mode offset
builds IOM command register value: direction, address, length, speed from params, with bit packing
reads IOM status register, checks error bits (0x6c=error), returns status code
validates IOM transfer params: speed<6, address alignment, buffer size, DMA requirements
resets discovery state (pending=0, end=0xFF), initiates ATT Read By Type via attcWriteReq
allocates WSF msg (payload+0xd), sets length/handle/params, submits via ble_att_handler
allocs 8-byte WSF msg, sets type=1, encodes address/auth/bond/key params, sends to SMP via DmSecMsgSendToSmp
allocs 0x20-byte WSF msg, sets type=0x28, copies 0x1a bytes auth response data, posts to handler
finds connection by handle via dmConnCcbByHandle, sends connection update (opcode 0x72) via dmConnUpdExecute
allocates 0x28 bytes via vtable allocator, clears to zero = cJSON item node allocation
returns 0x2e ('.') = locale-independent decimal point character
parses numeric value from JSON stream: handles +/-/./e/E, calls strtod, stores as double and int32
advances buffer position past whitespace chars (<0x21), stops at end or non-whitespace
checks for UTF-8 BOM (0xEF 0xBB 0xBF via strncmp) at buffer start, advances 3 bytes if found
main value dispatcher: checks for true/false/null/string/number/array/object prefix, dispatches to sub-parsers
parses JSON array: checks depth<1000, iterates comma-separated values, builds linked list of cJSON items
tangent function: normalizes by pi, Payne-Hanek reduction, polynomial approximation, reciprocal for cotangent
string-to-double: handles sign, integer/fraction digits, exponent, via FT_MulFix-based polynomial
thin wrapper: calls strtod(param_1, param_2, 0, 0) with zero exponent offset and no endptr
asserts param_3!=0, reads from flash via fdb_read_raw, then verifies data integrity
calls ARM getProcessStackPointer() intrinsic and returns PSP value
empty function (returns void) - MSP retrieval stub or no-op for single-stack mode
checks Thumb-2 BL/BLX encoding (F800/F000 prefix) or BX (4700 prefix), returns 1 if branch
collects call stack: scans stack for return addresses, validates with is_branch_instr, fills array
checks ICSR active exception bit, adjusts stack offset +0x48 if in handler mode (FP context)
maps fault type (0-5) to string pointer from 6-entry lookup table
iterates module table entries, validates init data (0x18-byte compare), checks version constraint
sets module count=2, validates all modules, sets init flag on success
validates read bounds against module size (+0x38), dispatches via vtable at +0x30
iterates all registered modules, calls init function at +0x24 for each, sets global init flag
searches module table comparing 0x18 bytes (name/descriptor) via strncmp, returns match
sets bit in pending IRQ bitmap based on param (same pattern as svc_audio_irq_set_pending)
stores callback param into *param_1, then triggers task_ble_wsf_process
returns DAT_00439cd8 (global config/state pointer)
